# CWE-256 negative: bcrypt hash stored instead of plaintext
lang: go
file: CWE-256-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"golang.org/x/crypto/bcrypt"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type accountRow struct {
	Username string `gorm:"column:username"`
	Password string `gorm:"column:password"`
}

// CWE-256 Plaintext Storage of a Password (mitigated)
func RegisterUser(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) {
	plain := c.PostForm("password")
	hash, err := bcrypt.GenerateFromPassword([]byte(plain), bcrypt.DefaultCost)
	if err != nil {
		c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": "hash"})
		return
	}
	user := accountRow{Username: c.PostForm("username"), Password: string(hash)}
	if err := db.Create(&user).Error; err != nil {
		c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": "save"})
		return
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusCreated, gin.H{"username": user.Username})
}
